package rulecoverage

func PositiveTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDto() string {
    ruleID := "tests_assert_raw_json_strings_without_response_dto"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Brittle raw-JSON string assertions when typed response DTOs exist."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
